bead.title: Delete DDx no-op compaction breaker
bead.description: Delete DDx's synthetic no-op compaction breaker after Fizeau removes the stale no-op compaction policy. Pure no-op compactions are silent in Fizeau, and DDx must not infer runtime failure from internal compaction telemetry. In-scope files: cli/internal/agent/agent_runner_service.go no-op compaction constants/streak/detection, agent_runner_service_test.go no-op compaction tests, session_index_test.go fixtures as needed. Out of scope: DDx queue-level no-progress cooldowns based on DDx-owned attempt outcomes.
bead.acceptance:
1. serviceNoopCompactionWallClockLimit, serviceNoopCompactionStreak, isNoopCompactionEvent, and compaction_stuck_wall_clock_timeout production logic are removed.
2. drainServiceEvents does not synthesize stalled finals from compaction telemetry.
3. rg 'no.?op compaction|NoCompaction|compaction_stuck_wall_clock|compaction\.end' cli/internal/agent has no production hits except historical docs/tests intentionally retained.
4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run 'Test.*Service|Test.*Compaction|Test.*SessionIndex' -count=1 passes.
